sentences.arabic: أَخَذَ سَامِيٌّ ابْنَهُ الصَّغِيرَ إِلَى الطَّبِيبِ لِلْفَحْصِ الدَّوْرِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Sami je odveo svog malog sina kod ljekara na redovni pregled.
sentences.translationEn: Sami took his young son to the doctor for a routine check-up.

sentences.translation: Ljekar je izmjerio dijete i izmjerio mu visinu.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor weighed the child and measured his height.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ الطِّفْلَ بِصِحَّةٍ جَيِّدَةٍ وَيَنْمُو بِشَكْلٍ طَبِيعِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da je dijete zdravo i da normalno raste.
sentences.translationEn: He said the child is in good health and growing normally.

sentences.arabic: سَعِدَ سَامِيٌّ بِهَذِهِ الْأَخْبَارِ وَشَكَرَ الطَّبِيبَ.
sentences.translation: Sami se obradovao ovim vijestima i zahvalio ljekaru.
sentences.translationEn: Sami was happy with this news and thanked the doctor.
